caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a studio setting. His shirt features the text "ICON NEVEIDO SHIT AT WORK" in white and red lettering. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone, with a background consisting of a wall filled with framed photographs and a white mannequin torso. In the lower-left corner, a logo reading "SIT DOWN" is visible, and in the lower-right, red text says "REALLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his left arm. He begins by raising his hand in a waving or emphasizing motion, which reaches its highest point before he gradually lowers his arm across the subsequent frames. His facial expression remains focused as he looks toward someone off-camera while speaking into the microphone.
